title: Return and Refund Policy
content: Customers can request a return from the order details page by selecting a reason and uploading proof if required. Sellers review return requests and approved returns are processed after item receipt.

title: Shipping and Delivery
content: Order statuses move through pending, processing, shipped, and delivered. Delivery time depends on seller location and courier availability. Customers can track updates from the Orders page.

title: Order Tracking
content: Customers can view order status and tracking updates in their order history. If tracking data is missing, they can contact support or message the seller.

title: Payments
content: Supported payment methods include credit card, debit card, paypal, and cash on delivery based on checkout options.

title: Account and Security
content: Users should keep credentials secure and use password reset if access is lost. Unauthorized access issues should be reported to support immediately.
